vibe: Authority, Clarity, Truth. Objective, rigid, functional.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-extrabold text-[#0A0A0A]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-[#0A0A0A]

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-[#F9FAFB]), 1px sharp border (border-[#E5E7EB]), no shadow. On hover: shadow-sm border-[#D1D5DB].
surface_strategies.camera_module: Technical grid look. border-collapse with scanning line animation over the camera feed. Stark black borders for the video container to emphasize functionality.
surface_strategies.tables: Minimalist borders. Row borders only (border-b), no vertical borders. hover:bg-[#F3F4F6].

components.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-md). High contrast. Primary: bg-[#0033CC] text-white hover:bg-[#002699]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#E5E7EB] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#F9FAFB].
components.inputs: Flat, rounded-md, border border-[#E5E7EB] bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0033CC] focus:border-transparent text-[#0A0A0A].
components.sidebar: Clean, light grey (bg-[#F9FAFB]) with dark text for active states. 1px border-r border-[#E5E7EB].

icons_library.name: @phosphor-icons/react
icons_library.usage: Use Duotone weight for marketing/empty states, Regular or Bold for dense dashboard UI.

images.description: University campus building. Use as a subtle, low-opacity background or side-panel image on the login page.
Modern university building with trees. Useful for generic dashboard empty states or welcome banners.
Portrait of a student. Use as a placeholder for student profile or face recognition mockups.
Portrait of a younger student. Use as a placeholder for student profile or list views.

animations.hover_states: Quick, snappy transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
animations.page_transitions: Subtle fade in for data tables and dashboard cards to reduce cognitive load.
animations.camera_scan: Use framer-motion to create a green (success) or blue (scanning) horizontal line that moves vertically across the video feed overlay to simulate AI face scanning.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against white/grey backgrounds meets 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add data-testid to all interactive elements, e.g., data-testid='admin-login-button', data-testid='sidebar-nav-students'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard Shadcn components but override generic styles with the colors and typography specified here.
Avoid card heavy layouts. Emphasize data clarity using borders and spacing instead of heavy shadows or rounded rectangles.
The Live Camera Face Recognition page should look highly technical. Use a dark or stark black container for the webcam feed, overlaid with a scanning line animation.
Use Manrope for headings and Figtree for body text. IBM Plex Mono for numbers, stats, and timestamps to give a technical 'AI' feel.
Include data-testids on EVERY button, input, and navigation link.
All navigation must be a sidebar (bg-[#F9FAFB]) with clear active state indicators (e.g., text-[#0033CC] and a left border highlight).
